messages.text: Basket 1: a bunny-shaped wicker basket with a rounded body and a small head sticking out.
Placed it. Go to Basket 2.
Basket 2: a round brown wicker basket with a very dark arched handle.
Is the handle almost black and the basket more pot-shaped than open and shallow?
Basket 2: yes—an almost black handle on a deep, pot-shaped brown basket.
Placed it. Go to Basket 3.
Basket 3: a picnic basket with a hinged lid flipped open.

Placed it. Go to Basket 6.

Placed it. Before we move on, can you remind me of Basket 5?

Placed it. Before we move on, can you remind me of Basket 5?
Basket 5: the rectangular basket — a small open rectangular wicker basket with one thick braided arch handle.
Placed it. Go to Basket 12.
Basket 12: a squarish light-brown bucket basket with a single plain arch handle. Confirm when you place it.
Done. Ready to submit.
